params._feeRecipient: Initial address to receive platform fees

createEscrow(address,address,address,uin.details: Access is restricted to the owner to prevent spam/grief attacks and      fake client registrations. The api service calls this on behalf of clients      after verifying the gig on-chain.

params.milestoneAmounts: Array of per-milestone amounts (wei or token units)
params.tokenAddress: ERC-20 token address, or address(0) for ETH

returns.escrowAddress: Address of the newly deployed GigEscrow

getAllEscrows().details: WARNING: unbounded — will revert at scale. Use getEscrowCount + getEscrow for production pagination.

proposeOwner(address).details: Two-step transfer prevents loss of ownership due to typos or compromised keys.

setFeeRecipient(address).details: The new feeRecipient is captured at deploy time for each GigEscrow, so      this change affects only escrows created after this call. Existing deployed      escrows retain the feeRecipient value set when they were deployed.

acceptOwnership().notice: Accept ownership transfer. Must be called by the pendingOwner.

createEscrow(address,address,address,uin.notice: Deploy a new GigEscrow for a gig. Callable only by the factory owner.

getAllEscrows().notice: WARNING: unbounded — will revert at scale due to block gas limit.         Use getEscrowCount() + getEscrow(index) for production pagination.

getEscrow(uint256).notice: Get the escrow address at a specific index (for paginated access)

getEscrowCount().notice: Number of escrows deployed by this factory

owner().notice: Owner of the factory (acts as arbitrator for all deployed escrows)

pendingOwner().notice: Pending owner for two-step ownership transfer; address(0) when no transfer is in progress

proposeOwner(address).notice: Propose a new owner. The proposed address must call acceptOwnership() to complete the transfer.
